title: 404 error when accessing publicly available chat
symptom: After enabling the 'Make Chat Publicly Available' option, accessing the generated URL results in a 404 Not Found error.
applies_when: Using the 'When chat message received' node
Chat is set to be publicly available
not_this_if: Chat is accessed from the editor
Environment variable N8N_DISABLE_PRODUCTION_MAIN_PROCESS is not set to 1
root_cause: The error occurs because the environment variable N8N_DISABLE_PRODUCTION_MAIN_PROCESS is set to 1, which prevents the main process from running in production mode, leading to the 404 error when trying to access the public chat URL.
fix_steps: Access your environment variables for n8n
Change its value from 1 to True or remove it entirely
agent_instruction: Remove or change the N8N_DISABLE_PRODUCTION_MAIN_PROCESS environment variable and restart the service.
